content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-029)

## CRITICAL / must-fix-this-iter — GREEN THE TREE FIRST
1. **Fix `DualInverse.lean:219` before anything else.** Change `← map_smul` → `← LinearMap.map_smul`
   in `linearEndo_apply_comm`. Root cause (lean-auditor, confirmed): unqualified `map_smul` resolves to
   the project-local `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.map_smul` in the full-import context, not
   `LinearMap.map_smul`. This single token greens DualInverse and **transitively lands** the three
   iter-029 closures that are currently RED:
   - `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` (B1 eval-core),
   - `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` hN (TensorObjInverse),
   - and unblocks `tensorObj_unit_self_duality_collapse` (already proven mod B1).
   Dispatch a one-line prover lane on DualInverse, OR have the planner note it for the first prover.
   After the fix, **re-run `lake build TensorObjInverse` to confirm green** and that `sync_leanok`
   restores the ~29 stripped markers — do not treat the closures as landed until then.

## HIGH — verification discipline (knowledge-base lesson)
2. **Do NOT trust isolated `lake env lean <scratch>` + LSP-clean as proof of closure.** A proof using an
   UNQUALIFIED lemma name can pass a thin scratch (shadowing decl not imported) and pass LSP (lazy/cached)
   yet fail the full `lake build` of the owning module. Provers must confirm a closing proof with a real
   `lake build` of the owning module. This burned a whole iter (29 markers lost on a verified-but-RED tree).

## μ-side (TensorObjSubstrate) — the real critical-path residual
3. **`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` (sorry@L4353)** is now the SOLE genuine open residual on the
   K1 μ-side (rhs_tmul proven, comparison assembly proven, mu_appIso_collapse downstream). Prove the LHS
   mate pure-tensor value: unfold `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_μ` + `homEquiv_unit` to
   `unit ≫ (pushforward φ').map (δ Gβ ≫ (counit ⊗ₘ counit))`, evaluate at `m ⊗ₜ n`. This is the iter-028
   "mate-vs-composition asymmetry" residual — NOT a 1-1 port of `pushforwardComp_lax_μ`. If it stalls,
   effort-break it (mate-unfold half / δ-collapse half).
4. **`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (sorry@L4506):** do NOT retry the IsMonoidal/mate route (CIRCULAR,
   confirmed iter-026/028). Once lhs_tmul lands, rewrite the collapse to consume
   `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` at morphism level.

## MEDIUM — blueprint hygiene (blueprint-writer, not blocking)
5. `lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` — blueprint frames it as a one-sided VALUE
   (`LHS = m⊗n`) but the Lean is a per-section morphism COMPARISON
   (`μ(rightAdjointLaxMonoidal).app W = μ(presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal).app W`). Re-word the statement
   block to match; move the `rhs_tmul` + `pushforward_μ_eq` `\uses` from the parent to inside lhs_tmul
   (they are consumed there, not in the parent's `hom_ext`). See `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-substrate029.md`.
6. Document the `rhs_tmul` abstraction in the blueprint: the Lean is the abstract `restrictScalars`-μ
   value applied to the K1 composition tensorator by defeq (`pushforward_μ_eq` is `rfl`).

## Blueprint coverage debt (unmatched lean_aux — for planner to blueprint)
7. New helper `linearEndo_apply_comm` (DualInverse.lean, S-linear endos of regular module commute on 1)
   has no blueprint entry — author a trivial `\lean{}` block. (unmatched=105; this is the new addition.)

## Do-NOT-reassign
- `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` via IsMonoidal/`unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ` — CIRCULAR (3+ iters).
- `exists_tensorObj_inverse` — leave gated until DualInverse is green and hN/B1 land.
